title: How marketers are using Google Antigravity
summary: Google Antigravity is an agentic development platform that evolves the IDE into an agent-first era. It enables developers to operate at a higher task-oriented level by managing agents across workspaces while retaining a familiar AI IDE experience. Agents operate across the editor, terminal, and browser to autonomously plan and execute complex end-to-end tasks.
